title: xspv's pvp pack
description: Lightweight optimized modpack with amazing QoL for PvP /w essentials
body:
personal PvP modpack made public
no texture packs included. general optimization, QoL, sick custom hud, lunar freelook, show other players tier from mctiers, oh and essentials, their cosmetics & more.
show me mods silly goose 1. EMF 2. ETF 3. 3D Skin Layers 4. AppleSkin 5. ArchitecturyAPI 6. Better Ping Display 7. Bobby 8. Chat Heads 9. CIT Resewn 10. Cloth Config API 11. Controlling 12. CustomHud 13. Dynamic FPS 14. Entity Culling 15. Essential Mod 16. Fabric API 17. Freecam 18. Freelook 19. HitColor 20. Iris Shaders 21. LazyDFU 22. MaLiLib 23. Memory Leak Fix 24. Mod Menu 25. Model Gap Fix 26. ModernFix 27. More Chat History 28. Mouse Tweaks 29. NameTagPing 30. Reese's Sodium Options 31. Remove Reloading Screen 32. Searchables 33. Shulker Box Tooltip 34. Simple Voice Chat 35. Sodium 36. Status Effect Bars 37. Status Effect Timer 38. TierTagger 39. uku's Armor Hud 40. ukulib 41. YetAnotherConfigLib
thats all
